who: restaurant kitchen managers processing 5–15 inventory reports/week
offer: For restaurant kitchen managers processing 5–15 inventory reports/week, inaccurate inventory tracking causes stockouts and overordering. We provide weekly inventory usage reports instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory tracking leads to stockouts and overordering.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for kitchen managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on inventory tools
DM 20-50 kitchen managers with demo video
Join community forums for restaurant inventory management
try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 inventory items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
